rooms.name: The Entrance Hall
rooms.description: A grand entrance hall with cracked marble floors. A heavy iron gate blocks the way north. A strange alchemical formula is carved into the floor. A silver crescent moon symbol glints near the baseboards.

rooms.name: The Laboratory
rooms.description: A cluttered laboratory with bubbling beakers. A glass cabinet sealed with a chemical lock sits against the wall. A reinforced door with a cipher lock leads north. Shelves of chemicals line the walls.

rooms.name: The Workshop
rooms.description: A dusty workshop. A crank mechanism is mounted on the wall. A small skull-keyhole lock guards the north passage. Gears and springs are scattered everywhere.

rooms.name: The Crypt
rooms.description: A dimly lit crypt. A crescent moon altar and a massive glowing exit door stand at the far end. Ancient symbols pulse on the walls.

rooms.name: Freedom
rooms.description: You've escaped! Daylight and fresh air greet you at last.

items.name: iron key
items.description: A heavy iron key with an ornate head. Fits a gate lock.

items.name: silver medallion
items.description: A polished silver medallion with a crescent moon engraving. Seems important for somewhere deeper in.

items.name: torn alchemy page
items.description: A torn page reading: 'To create the universal solvent, combine the Azure Elixir with the Crimson Catalyst. To craft a cipher wheel, engrave a blank brass disc with a stylus.'

items.name: azure elixir
items.description: A vial of shimmering blue liquid. Label: 'Azure Elixir - Key Ingredient'.

items.name: crimson catalyst
items.description: A vial of vivid red liquid. Label: 'Crimson Catalyst - Key Ingredient'.

items.name: universal solvent
items.description: A vial of swirling purple liquid. It can dissolve any seal or lock.

items.name: blank brass disc
items.description: A flat brass disc with no markings. It could be engraved with symbols.

items.name: engraving stylus
items.description: A fine steel stylus used for engraving metal. It could mark a blank disc.

items.name: cipher wheel
items.description: A brass wheel with symbols etched around its rim. Fits cipher locks.

items.name: brass gear
items.description: A precision brass gear with fine teeth. Looks like part of a mechanism.

items.name: steel shaft
items.description: A sturdy steel shaft with a notch at one end. Could accept a gear.

items.name: hand crank
items.description: A hand crank assembled from a brass gear and steel shaft. Fits crank mechanisms.

items.name: mechanism key
items.description: A small key hidden inside the crank mechanism. Has a skull-shaped head.

items.name: master key
items.description: An ancient master key with glowing runes. Unlocks the final exit.

items.name: worn candle
items.description: A nearly burnt-out candle. No use here.

items.name: leather bound book
items.description: A dusty book about heraldry. Not useful.

items.name: broken compass
items.description: A cracked compass. The needle spins freely.

items.name: chipped vase
items.description: A porcelain vase with a chip. Empty.

items.name: rusty nail
items.description: A bent rusty nail. No practical use.

items.name: dusty glove
items.description: A single leather glove covered in dust.

items.name: green potion
items.description: A bubbling green liquid. Label says 'Experimental - Do Not Combine'.

items.name: yellow powder
items.description: A packet of yellow powder. Smells like sulfur.

items.name: empty beaker
items.description: A clean glass beaker. Empty and useless.

items.name: copper wire
items.description: A coil of copper wire. No power source.

items.name: rubber stopper
items.description: A rubber stopper. Doesn't fit anything here.

items.name: oil can
items.description: A can of machine oil. Mechanisms don't need it.

items.name: wooden mallet
items.description: A large mallet. Nothing to hammer.

items.name: chisel set
items.description: Stone chisels. Nothing to carve.

items.name: tape measure
items.description: A retractable tape measure. Precision not needed.

items.name: ball bearing
items.description: A single steel ball bearing. Just rolls around.

items.name: bone fragment
items.description: A piece of ancient bone. Too fragile.

items.name: tarnished ring
items.description: A silver ring with patina. Doesn't fit any lock.

items.name: dull dagger
items.description: A ceremonial dagger with blunt edge.

items.name: copper amulet
items.description: A copper amulet with sun symbol. Doesn't activate anything.

puzzles.name: iron gate
puzzles.description: A heavy iron gate blocks the way. It has an old-fashioned keyhole.

puzzles.name: sealed cabinet
puzzles.description: A glass cabinet sealed with a chemical lock. It needs a powerful solvent to open.

puzzles.name: cipher door
puzzles.description: A reinforced door with a cipher lock. A wheel with symbols needs to be inserted.

puzzles.name: crank mechanism
puzzles.description: A mechanism on the wall with a crank slot. Needs a hand crank to operate.

puzzles.name: skull lock
puzzles.description: A small lock with a skull-shaped keyhole. Guards the passage north.

puzzles.name: moon altar
puzzles.description: An altar with a crescent moon indentation. A silver medallion with a moon symbol would fit perfectly.

puzzles.name: stone exit door
puzzles.description: A massive stone door with a glowing keyhole. Needs the ancient master key.

hints.text: The torn alchemy page mentioned combining the Azure Elixir with the Crimson Catalyst to create a universal solvent.
The torn page also mentioned engraving a blank brass disc with a stylus to craft a cipher wheel.
A hand crank can be assembled by combining a brass gear with a steel shaft.
The moon altar needs a silver medallion with a moon symbol. You might have picked one up in the Entrance Hall.
